arts.sum: Tottenham’s rotten form continued against Newcastle United as they were beaten 2-1 at home to continue what has been a miserable run over the festive...

arts.ttl: Definitive Liverpool v Man Utd announcement made after midday meeting
arts.sum: An Amber weather warning had been put in place by the Met Office

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Manchester United postponement decision confirmed after second safety meeting
arts.sum: Two meetings were held this morning to determine whether Liverpool vs Man United would go ahead at Anfield.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Liverpool v Man Utd decision made after heavy snow forced emergency meeting
arts.sum: A final decision has been taken on Liverpool vs Manchester United at Anfield on Sunday after heavy snow forced the Safety Authority Group to make a call on the 4.30pm kick-off

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah vs Luiz Suarez: Who’ll be remembered as Liverpool’s greatest forward?
arts.sum: The topic of who the best ever single Premier League campaign belongs to is a divisive one. Some believe Thierry Henry’s 2002/03 campaign tops the pile after he scored 24 goals and racked u...

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp’s take on Darwin Nunez puts Liverpool manager Arne Slot in tricky spot
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has struggled heavily in his third season at Liverpool under Arne Slot, while Jurgen Klopp previously discussed what would make the striker tick at Anfield

arts.ttl: Will Liverpool vs Man Utd go ahead following heavy snow?
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' Vinny O'Connor provides an update from a snowy Anfield on whether Liverpool's clash against Manchester United will go ahead.

arts.ttl: Man Utd pay TWO clubs to sign Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: According to reports in Nigeria, including one in ThePapers, United are prepared to pay both Osimhen's release clause in his Napoli contract, as well as a compensation figure to Galatasaray. Man Utd are prepared to pay transfer fees to TWO clubs in order to sign Victor Osimhen during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United on 'at this stage'
arts.sum: A final safety meeting at midday will decide whether Liverpool's Premier League match against Manchester United at Anfield will go ahead.
